# Patentability checklist and self-assessment

Run both before calling a disclosure ready. Any unchecked box or
below-target score means revise, not submit.

## Checklist

**Novelty:**
- [ ] Prior-art search conducted (patents, standards, papers)
- [ ] Closest prior art identified explicitly
- [ ] Specific differences articulated against every close reference
- [ ] Not merely combining known components without novel interaction

**Non-obviousness:**
- [ ] Unexpected results vs. prior art
- [ ] Technical challenge or prejudice overcome
- [ ] Specific technical elements, not generic "use AI"
- [ ] Not the obvious next step for a skilled engineer
- [ ] Improvements quantified

**Subject matter:**
- [ ] Specific technical implementation, not an abstract idea
- [ ] Technical problem solved by technical means
- [ ] Measurable technical effect
- [ ] Not a business method or mental process
- [ ] Survives Alice/Mayo (US) and technical-character (EU) tests

**Detectability:**
- [ ] Infringement detectable at system boundaries
- [ ] Observable behaviors or API patterns described
- [ ] Standards-mandated elements identified (if applicable)
- [ ] Testing methodology described
- [ ] Not a purely internal algorithm with no external manifestation

**Completeness:**
- [ ] Every claim element supported in Section 6
- [ ] Implementation detail sufficient for a skilled engineer
- [ ] Alternatives provided for claim breadth
- [ ] Figures and diagrams included
- [ ] Commercial value articulated (Section 9)

## Self-assessment rubric

| Criterion | Target | Score |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| Novelty: specific differences from prior art identified | 8-10/10 | |
| Non-obviousness: unexpected results or synergies explained | 7-10/10 | |
| Commercial value: licensees and revenue model described | 7-10/10 | |
| Subject matter: specific technical implementation | 8-10/10 | |
| Claim support: all claim elements detailed in Section 6 | 10/10 | |
| Detectability: observable behaviors identified | 7-10/10 | |
| Completeness: all sections filled with sufficient detail | 10/10 | |

The skill does not report a disclosure as ready while any score is below
its target. Name the failing axis and the specific revision needed.
